tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # edit "LAN_HOST_192.168.1.3"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (LAN_HOST_192.168.1.3) # set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.2 55

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (LAN_HOST_192.168.1.3) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall address "LAN_HOST_192.168.1.3"
config firewall address
    edit "LAN_HOST_192.168.1.3"
        set uuid e8de78b2-291e-51f1-df3f-7ba0312078c0
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
